title: Placement counselling session
content: Date:16th June 2025 Time: 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM Venue: Old Auditorium, Galgotias University Location: Gautam Buddha Nagar, Uttar Pradesh Audience: Sem 6 and Sem 8 BPT Students 🎯 Objective of the Session: The primary aim of the event was to prepare final-year physiotherapy students for professional placements by guiding them on job readiness, resume development, interview strategies, and available opportunities in the physiotherapy field. 👨⚕️ Guest Speakers: * BPT, MPT (Orthopaedics) * Certified Functional Manipulation Therapist (Chile, South America) * Certified Dry Needling Therapist (Thailand), IASTM Therapist (Greece) * Founder, PAL Physiotherapy, Gurgaon * BPT, MPT (Ortho), COMT, MIAP * Certified Sports Rehabilitation Therapist (USA) * Group Head, Physiotherapy – Sarvodaya Hospitals & Research Centre (Faridabad & Greater Noida) 🗓️ Session Overview: The session began with a warm welcome address by the Dean and introduction of guest speakers. Key highlights of the session included: Internship & Observership Opportunities Insights into the importance of hands-on training and how to secure placements in reputed clinics and hospitals. Resume & Portfolio Building Step-by-step explanation of resume essentials tailored for physiotherapy students. Interview Skills Mock interview tips, body language cues, and common Q\&A practice to boost confidence. Career Pathways in Physiotherapy Clinical vs. academic vs. research vs. entrepreneurship opportunities discussed in detail. Interactive Q\&A Students actively participated, asking real-world questions about specialization choices, clinic setups, and global certification options. 📸 Glimpses of the Event: 🎤 Student Feedback: Students shared overwhelmingly positive feedback, appreciating the clarity of information, practical advice, and the motivational insights offered by the experts. Many found the session to be a turning point in shaping their professional outlook. 📌 Conclusion: The Placement Counselling Session was a grand success, fulfilling its objective of guiding physiotherapy students toward a clearer and more confident entry into the job market. The Department of Physiotherapy extends heartfelt gratitude to the guest speakers and all participants for making the event impactful.
